title: dudleya cymosa subsp. ovatifolia
intro: Dudleya cymosa subsp. ovatifolia, also known as the ovate-leafed live forever, is a rare succulent plant species belonging to the Dudleya genus, native to the Channel Islands, specifically Anacapa Island. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Dudleya cymosa subsp. ovatifolia are attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids, which have been shown to have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, potentially reducing inflammation and improving overall health. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and made into tea or capsules, although its usage should be approached with caution due to limited research and potential toxicity.
